tasks.label: Check if node_modules exists and install
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && bash -c 'if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then npm install -g corepack && corepack enable && pnpm install; fi'

tasks.label: Terminal with pnpm run dev
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && pnpm run dev
dependsOn: Check if node_modules exists and install

tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npm install -g corepack && corepack enable && pnpm install
tasks.label: install

tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && pnpm run dev
tasks.label: run
